text: The class-balanced pos_weight recipe (common for imbalanced classification) is actively harmful here.
Switching to unweighted BCE cuts mean Brier by 35-37% and calibrates the output (pred mean tracks empirical rate).

locator.quote: It pulls the output mean to ~0.46

text: Balanced pos_weight pulls the output mean to ~0.46 when the empirical positive rate is ~0.18 — over-confident, ranking-neutral, calibration-destroying.
